name: Create a Customer in Back Office
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can create customers in the back office for administrative customer setup outside of POS transactions, helping maintain customer records and prepare for upcoming business. This improves your retail operations by providing centralized customer creation, with properly configured back office customer setup typically enabling better pre-sale preparation and more accurate customer data management."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Understanding back office customer creation involves recognizing required fields, optional information capture, and integration with POS workflows to help retail operators focus on the right customer data management activities, ensuring your retail strategy consistently drives better customer service readiness and data accuracy outcomes."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Customers feature in Back Office allows you to create and manage your customers easily, right from within Retail Express. In addition to that, using the search filters you can narrow your customer record search and export the results into Microsoft Excel."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Customers can also be "}, {"text": "created directly within POS"}, {"text": ", and managed en-masse using the "}, {"text": "Mass Download"}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Mass Upload"}, {"text": " feature."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Create a customer"}], "data-id": "create-a-customer"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Customers > Customers ", "bold": true}, {"text": "(also available via Reports > Customer Reports > Customers or the \"Customers\" option from the Quick Links)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "New Customer ", "bold": true}, {"text": "at the bottom of the screen"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Update the information as required"}, {"text": "\n\n"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Some special characters are not supported in the customer fields, click here for a full list of supported characters and symbols."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Customer Fields"}], "data-id": "customer-fields"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When creating your customers the fields are as follows:"}, {"text": ""}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", system (for reference only)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Date Created"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "First Name"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The first name of the customer (mandatory field)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Last Name"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The customer's last name"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Company"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Company Name"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "ABN"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Australian Business Number"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Website"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The website address for the customer/company"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Email"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The email address for the customer - can be used in conjunction with the Newsletter functionality and the Customer Mass Download for mail merges etc"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Password"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If Retail Express was previously connected with a web store this field created a password for customers when they were initially created. This is a legacy field that is no longer synchronised nor required to be entered for a customer."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Date of Birth"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Date of Birth for the customer (DOB)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Date of Birth Withheld"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Used to track whether the customer has opted not to provide their date of birth (DOB)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Receive Email"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If the customer has subscribed to email communications; can be controlled through eCommerce integrations and used in the Newsletter functionality for creating customer mailing lists."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Receive Post"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If the customer has subscribed to postal/mail-out communications"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Receive SMS"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If the customer has subscribed to SMS Communications; included in the Customer Mass Download for reference (some SMS marketing technologies will allow you to import customer details).\u00a0"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Phone"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The customer's phone number"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Fax"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The customer's fax number"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Mobile"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The customer's mobile number"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-4e0d4231"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/405-create-a-customer-in-back-office#bo-customer-fields-billingaddress", "children": [{"text": "Billing Address"}]}], "data-id": "billing-address"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Screenshot20230914at11800AM.05T5g00000v58dPEAQ.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Screenshot20230914at11800AM.05T5g00000v58dPEAQ.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "User-added image", "width": 700, "height": 404}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The billing address fields are typically where the invoices/receipts should be made out to for the customer. When adding a customer to POS this will be the address information displayed on the \"Billing\" tab"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Field", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Details", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Address Line 1"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The first line of the address. If there is a unit number, apartment or building level it will typically reflect this information, with Address Line 2 used for the street information. If not, it will be the standard street address including the number e.g. 3 Ocean St."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Address Line 2"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The second line of the address (optional)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", This field is accessible from POS, so if using "}, {"text": "Loyalty"}, {"text": " it can be used to store a barcode of a customer loyalty card (which can be used to search for the customer by scanning the card in POS)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Customer Type"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Used to categorise the customer record, and available within POS and several reports in the Back Office e.g. Sales Report. Selecting a 60, 90 or 120 value will turn the customer into an Account Customer and they will not be required to pay a minimum deposit on sales (provided there is an available balance against their Credit Limit)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Stop Credit"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text":
